actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / full-approach exercise and repo-bridge review; PR230 y_t closure remains open

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The completed taste-radial row packet can become PR230 closure once chunk063 lands.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Supply accepted same-surface O_H plus C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows and rerun Gram/FV/IR gates.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: The rows are finite C_ss/C_sx/C_xx staging rows; x is not certified canonical O_H.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: Degree-one Z3 radial uniqueness identifies the physical Higgs operator.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Derive the same-surface EW/Higgs action and canonical LSZ normalization.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Block28 proves the axis only under a future action premise that O_H is degree-one radial.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: FMS composite O_H can be imported as proof authority.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Derive/adopt a same-surface EW/Higgs action with dynamic Phi, v, h, and source rows.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: FMS gives the right composite-operator shape only after a gauge-Higgs action and Phi field exist on the surface.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: A source-only scalar response determines source-Higgs overlap.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Measure C_sH and C_HH or prove a physical rank-one neutral theorem.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Source-only counterfamilies preserve C_ss while changing C_sH and canonical y_H.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: GNS, flat-extension, or moment theory can create the missing O_H label.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Use them only after C_ss/C_sH/C_HH rows exist.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Moment tools certify full matrices; they do not name the absent second operator.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: Determinant positivity is enough for neutral scalar uniqueness.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Prove positivity improvement/irreducibility for the physical neutral transfer kernel.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Positivity preservation is compatible with reducible neutral sectors.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: W/Z response can bypass O_H without extra rows.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Build the strict matched physical-response packet.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: The response route still needs accepted action, production W/Z rows, same-source top rows, covariance, strict g2, and delta_perp.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: Observed g2, W/Z masses, m_t, or y_t can select the bridge.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Use observed values only as comparators after a same-surface derivation or measurement.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: That would repeat the target-selection pattern PR230 was designed to avoid.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The recent Ward same-1PI repair can be loaded into PR230.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Let the Ward audit lane decide; keep PR230 on physical correlator/source-Higgs/WZ evidence.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: The narrow Ward work still uses H_unit/y_t_bare language and leaves the physical readout/matching issue separate.

assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Prove a new substrate scale-stationarity theorem or keep double-criticality conditional.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: The beta-lambda no-go shows stationarity is an extra codimension-one selector.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: Picard-Fuchs or exact ODE methods can bypass the missing PR230 bridge.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: After Z(beta,s,h) is defined, use PF/WZ/tensor methods to certify rows.
assumptions_exercise.stress_result: False as a bridge; useful as a computation engine.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Exact ODEs compute defined finite-volume integrals; they do not define O_H or C_sH.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: Neutral H3/H4 can be inferred from finite C_sx rows.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Supply same-surface H3 physical transfer/off-diagonal generator and H4 source-Higgs coupling authority.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Finite covariance rows are not a physical transfer/action generator or irreducibility proof.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: A scalar LSZ denominator proxy can be repaired by prose contact subtraction.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Build strict scalar-LSZ/Stieltjes/FV certificate tied to canonical O_H or W/Z response.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: Current diagnostics reject the raw proxy; contact, threshold, FV/IR, and model-class authority must be explicit.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: New literature can serve as hidden derivation authority.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Enter each item in the import ledger and keep it out of retained proof unless retired.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: The physics-loop protocol classifies literature as method/context unless it supplies a theorem with explicit import status.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: An external EW/Higgs action extension would close current-surface PR230.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Derive the action from Cl(3)/Z3 or explicitly register/adopt a new premise with audit status.
assumptions_exercise.stress_result: False unless adopted/derived on the surface.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: An external extension can produce conditional support, not current retained closure.

assumptions_exercise.assumption: The direct top-correlator compute path is scientifically unnecessary if a bridge proof appears.
assumptions_exercise.falsifier_or_retirement_path: Continue chunk compute as support while prioritizing action-first O_H or strict W/Z packets.
assumptions_exercise.stress_result: Partly true but not currently actionable.
assumptions_exercise.why_it_matters: A retained bridge could replace month-scale compute, but every known bridge still lacks O_H/action/rows or stationarity.

conditional_surface_status: Exact support if a future accepted same-surface O_H/action plus strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH rows exists, or if a strict W/Z physical-response packet or neutral primitive/rank-one theorem is supplied.
decision: The best next PR230 route is still action-first O_H authority plus source-Higgs pole rows. Strict W/Z response is the main fallback. Neutral primitive/rank-one is the theorem-only fallback. Other bridge work supplies context, methods, or separate lanes, not current PR230 closure.

constraint_deletions: Stop treating chunk completion as closure; it is row support until x=O_H is certified.
Stop asking source-only data to name the hidden Higgs coordinate.
Stop using exact-math tooling before the physical functional/operator is defined.
Stop mixing Ward repair authority into the direct-observable PR230 route.
Stop letting comparator proximity select a bridge.
elon_exercise.decision: Prioritize action-first O_H authority, with strict W/Z as fallback. Keep chunk rows and exact math as support engines, not closure substitutes.
elon_exercise.first_principles_question: What is the smallest physical artifact that would let PR230 compute y_t without renaming H_unit, importing observed targets, or waiting for full month-scale MC?
elon_exercise.interpretation: No canonical 'Elon exercise' section was found in the local physics-loop skill. This packet implements it as a first-principles / 10x constraint-removal exercise.
elon_exercise.irreducible_missing_object: The missing object is not a number. It is a same-surface physical map from the PR230 source coordinate to the canonical scalar/Higgs coordinate, with enough time-kernel or response data to read a pole residue.
elon_exercise.non_negotiable_bottleneck: A same-surface physical bridge from the PR230 source to canonical Higgs response: either accepted O_H plus C_ss/C_sH/C_HH rows, strict W/Z matched response, or neutral primitive/rank-one authority.

ten_x_redesigns.idea: Build or derive the same-surface EW/Higgs action and O_H source directly, then run a small strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pilot before full production.
ten_x_redesigns.risk: If the action is an external extension rather than derived, status remains conditional.
ten_x_redesigns.why_10x: One accepted operator/action packet can replace many proxy-row and alias gates.

ten_x_redesigns.idea: Measure same-source top plus W/Z response with covariance and strict non-observed g2.
ten_x_redesigns.risk: Engineering-heavy and still blocked by accepted action and delta_perp authority.
ten_x_redesigns.why_10x: It may bypass explicit O_H pole-overlap if the physical response packet is complete.

ten_x_redesigns.idea: Prove a physical positivity-improving transfer kernel in the neutral scalar sector.
ten_x_redesigns.risk: All current positive-cone facts are support; no physical transfer kernel is present.
ten_x_redesigns.why_10x: A theorem could turn source overlap into a uniqueness consequence.

ten_x_redesigns.idea: Use Picard-Fuchs/WZ/tensor/Herglotz methods only after the two-source functional exists.
ten_x_redesigns.risk: No bridge value until O_H/action are supplied.
ten_x_redesigns.why_10x: Can convert a finite row computation into exact or bounded proof once objects are defined.

zeroth_principles_chain.non_importable_shortcut: SM field names or continuum Higgs labels before the same-surface operator exists.
zeroth_principles_chain.primitive: Cl(3)/Z3 finite lattice degrees of freedom with gauge links, staggered fermions, and the declared substrate action.
zeroth_principles_chain.required_bridge: A native action/transfer object that makes the relevant scalar/gauge response an observable on this state space.

zeroth_principles_chain.non_importable_shortcut: Bare-source labels, H_unit labels, or matrix elements used as definitions.
zeroth_principles_chain.primitive: Gauge-invariant Euclidean correlation functions generated by source derivatives of the partition function.
zeroth_principles_chain.required_bridge: A source functional Z(beta, s, h, ...) whose derivatives are physically identified without target fitting.

zeroth_principles_chain.non_importable_shortcut: Finite equal-time covariance rows treated as pole residues.
zeroth_principles_chain.primitive: Reflection-positive transfer/kernel data and long-distance pole structure.
zeroth_principles_chain.required_bridge: Strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH time-kernel rows or a theorem that fixes the hidden neutral coordinate.

zeroth_principles_chain.non_importable_shortcut: Declaring the taste-radial/source axis to be O_H by symmetry label alone.
zeroth_principles_chain.primitive: The Higgs readout is the normalized physical scalar direction that couples to masses.
zeroth_principles_chain.required_bridge: Accepted same-surface EW/Higgs action and canonical O_H/LSZ normalization, or a neutral primitive/rank-one proof.

zeroth_principles_chain.non_importable_shortcut: Defining y_t_bare from a matrix element or choosing observed m_t/y_t as a selector.
zeroth_principles_chain.primitive: y_t is read from m_t = y_t v/sqrt(2) or an equivalent physical response after m_t/v and the scalar coordinate are observable inputs.
zeroth_principles_chain.required_bridge: Direct top correlator measurement, strict W/Z matched response, or source-Higgs pole-residue readout with explicit v input status.

forbidden_load_bearing_inputs: alpha_LM/u0/plaquette chain as y_t proof input
renaming C_sx/C_xx as C_sH/C_HH before O_H is certified

literature_search.exact_item_used: Gauge-invariant composite-Higgs language behind the FMS route.
literature_search.pr230_impact: Supports O_H = Phi^dagger Phi - <Phi^dagger Phi> only after Phi/action/v/h exist.
literature_search.source: Frohlich, Morchio, Strocchi, Higgs phenomenon without symmetry breaking order parameter, IHES P/81/12

literature_search.exact_item_used: Observable spectrum built from gauge-invariant states; FMS map can fail in generalized sectors.
literature_search.pr230_impact: Reinforces using gauge-invariant composite operators, not gauge-dependent labels.
literature_search.source: Maas, Sondenheimer, Toerek, On the observable spectrum of theories with a BEH effect, arXiv:1709.07477

literature_search.exact_item_used: Gauge-Higgs lattice surface context and confinement-Higgs continuity constraints.
literature_search.pr230_impact: Constrains action-adoption thinking; it is not an O_H/source-overlap selector.
literature_search.source: Fradkin and Shenker, Phase diagrams of lattice gauge theories with Higgs fields, Phys. Rev. D 19, 3682

literature_search.exact_item_used: Transfer-matrix setting for Euclidean lattice gauge theory.
literature_search.pr230_impact: Useful for future time-kernel pole rows; no current O_H closure.
literature_search.source: Luscher, Construction of a selfadjoint, strictly positive transfer matrix for Euclidean lattice gauge theories

literature_search.pr230_impact: Confirms compute route shape; not a derivation if Yukawa is scanned as input.
literature_search.source: Bulava et al., Higgs-Yukawa model in chirally-invariant lattice field theory, arXiv:1210.1798

literature_search.pr230_impact: Helps production design only; does not retire the PR230 bridge.
literature_search.source: Gerhold/Jansen style lattice Higgs-Yukawa program, examples around arXiv:0912.0407 and arXiv:1111.4789

math_search.exact_item_used: Flat/rank-preserving extensions imply unique finitely atomic representing measures.
math_search.pr230_impact: Powerful after full source-Higgs moment matrix exists; source-only data remain underdetermined.
math_search.source: Curto and Fialkow, Truncated K-moment problems in several variables

math_search.exact_item_used: Matrix-valued spectral measures and Herglotz representations.
math_search.pr230_impact: Correct language for C_ss/C_sH/C_HH spectral rows; cannot invent missing entries.
math_search.source: Gesztesy and Tsekanovskii, On Matrix-Valued Herglotz Functions

math_search.exact_item_used: Minimal realization from Markov parameters is coordinate/similarity-class data.
math_search.pr230_impact: Explains why source-only response cannot fix canonical hidden coordinate.
math_search.source: Ho and Kalman, Effective construction of linear state-variable models from input/output functions

math_search.exact_item_used: Complex Perron-Frobenius and cone contraction spectral gaps.
math_search.pr230_impact: Candidate toolkit for neutral primitive theorem after physical transfer kernel exists.
math_search.source: Rugh, Cones and gauges in complex spaces, Annals of Mathematics 171 (2010)

math_search.exact_item_used: Gauge group reconstruction from observable/local algebra structure.
math_search.pr230_impact: Conceptual route for reconstructing fields from observables, but far larger data than PR230 has.
math_search.source: Doplicher and Roberts, Endomorphisms of C*-algebras, cross products, and duality for compact groups

math_search.exact_item_used: Sparse finite moment reconstruction by annihilating/eigenvalue methods.
math_search.pr230_impact: Could help if finite-rank isolated-pole assumptions are certified; current prefixes are not enough.
math_search.source: Kunis, Peter, Roemer, von der Ohe, multivariate Prony method

math_search.pr230_impact: Useful pattern after Z(beta,s,h) is defined; not an O_H or y_t selector.
math_search.source: Plaquette V=1 Picard-Fuchs ODE work in the repo and PR #1131 audit review

route_recommendations.next_artifact: Accepted same-surface EW/Higgs action or Cl(3)/Z3 derivation, then C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows.
route_recommendations.route: Action-first canonical O_H plus source-Higgs rows
route_recommendations.why_best: Directly retires the named missing bridge and uses FMS correctly.

route_recommendations.next_artifact: Production W/Z rows, same-source top rows, matched covariance, strict non-observed g2, delta_perp.
route_recommendations.why_best: Can bypass explicit source-Higgs overlap if all physical response authority is present.

route_recommendations.next_artifact: Physical positivity-improving transfer kernel or off-diagonal neutral generator plus source-Higgs coupling.

route_recommendations.next_artifact: Define Z(beta,s,h) or strict response functional first, then use PF/WZ/Herglotz/tensor certificates.
